systems.description: Select which iAqualink systems you want to add to Home Assistant. If no systems are listed, none were detected and you can continue without selecting any.

data_description.password: The password associated with your account.
data_description.username: The email address used to sign in to your account using the iAquaLink app or website.

init.description: Select which iAqualink systems you want to add to Home Assistant. If no systems are listed, none were detected and you can continue without selecting any.
